name: Sunima Das
title: Data Analyst
tagline: Transforming complex data into clear, actionable insights
objective: Skilled in Power BI (Desktop & Service), SQL, and data modeling to transform complex data into actionable insights. Proficient in DAX, Power Query, and ETL processes for data cleaning and transformation. Experienced in connecting multiple data sources (SQL Server, Excel), implementing Row-Level Security (RLS), and managing App Workspaces with scheduled data refresh using the On-Premise Data Gateway. Strong in SQL querying, data analysis, and visual storytelling, with a focus on accuracy, performance, and clear business insights.

projects.title: E-commerce Sales Analysis
projects.description: End-to-end sales analytics solution with a relational database and interactive Power BI dashboards.
highlights: Designed relational database with 5 tables (Customers, Products, Orders, Order Details, Regions) for sales performance analysis.
Developed SQL queries to calculate KPIs such as revenue trends, customer lifetime value (CLV), repeat customer rate, product return rates, and regional sales performance.
Built Power BI dashboards to visualize sales trends, product/category insights, regional performance, and customer segmentation (Platinum, Gold, Silver, Bronze).

projects.title: Mobile Sales Dashboard
projects.description: Interactive dashboard analyzing mobile sales performance across cities, brands, and models.
highlights: Built interactive dashboard analyzing mobile sales performance across cities, brands, and models.
Added 8 KPI cards including Total Sales, Units Sold, Transactions, and Average Transaction Value.
Implemented drill-downs and visuals (maps, line, bar, pie charts) to view sales from monthly to daily levels and brand-to-model performance.

certifications.title: Data Analytics Virtual Internship
certifications.description: Conducted data analysis, created Tableau dashboards, and presented insights.

certifications.title: Data Analytics Virtual Internship
certifications.description: Performed EDA, proposed predictive modeling, and designed AI-driven collections strategy.
